restaurants.name: Trattoria Luna
restaurants.description: Cozy Italian spot known for handmade pasta, wood-fired pizzas, and an intimate candlelit atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Sakura Sushi Bar
restaurants.description: Premium omakase experience featuring seasonal fish flown in daily from Tokyo's Tsukiji market.

restaurants.name: Casa Verde
restaurants.description: Vibrant taqueria serving authentic street tacos, fresh guacamole, and craft margaritas.

restaurants.name: Spice Route
restaurants.description: Modern Indian kitchen blending traditional tandoor techniques with contemporary plating.

restaurants.name: The Burger Joint
restaurants.description: Classic American diner serving grass-fed burgers, crispy fries, and thick milkshakes.

restaurants.name: Golden Dragon
restaurants.description: Chinatown institution famous for dim sum brunches and Peking duck carved tableside.

restaurants.name: Bangkok Garden
restaurants.description: Aromatic Thai curries, pad thai, and spicy basil stir-fries in a lush garden setting.

restaurants.name: Le Petit Bistro
restaurants.description: Elegant French bistro offering escargot, coq au vin, and an award-winning wine cellar.

restaurants.name: Olive & Thyme
restaurants.description: Sun-kissed Mediterranean plates with mezze spreads, grilled seafood, and fresh hummus.

restaurants.name: Seoul Kitchen
restaurants.description: Sizzling Korean BBQ, bubbling kimchi jjigae, and banchan served with every meal.

restaurants.name: Nonna's Table
restaurants.description: Family-run trattoria with Sunday gravy, ricotta gnocchi, and tiramisu made in-house.

restaurants.name: Ramen House 47
restaurants.description: Late-night ramen spot with rich tonkotsu broth, soft-boiled eggs, and house-made noodles.

restaurants.name: Taco Libre
restaurants.description: Fast-casual Mexican with build-your-own burrito bowls and house-made salsas.

restaurants.name: Curry Leaf
restaurants.description: South Indian specialties including dosas, biryanis, and coconut-based curries.

restaurants.name: Farm & Table
restaurants.description: Farm-to-table American cuisine highlighting local produce and sustainable sourcing.

restaurants.name: Jade Palace
restaurants.description: Upscale Cantonese dining with live seafood tanks and banquet-style family meals.

restaurants.name: Thai Orchid
restaurants.description: Authentic Thai flavors with mango sticky rice and spicy papaya salad.

restaurants.name: Bistro Margaux
restaurants.description: Neighborhood French cafe with croque monsieur, onion soup, and sidewalk seating.

restaurants.name: Aegean Blue
restaurants.description: Greek-inspired mezze, grilled octopus, and baklava in a breezy coastal-themed space.

restaurants.name: K-Town BBQ
restaurants.address: 1100 S Van Ness Ave, San Francisco, CA
restaurants.description: Interactive tabletop grilling with premium marinated short rib and soju cocktails.
